reasoning: The 2025 Chilean general election took place in November 2025, and results indicate that no candidate secured 50% outright. Crucially, the top two finishers who advanced to the December 14, 2025 runoff were Communist Party candidate Jeannette Jara and Republican Party candidate José Antonio Kast. As a minor candidate for the Christian Social Party (PSC), Francesca Muñoz did not advance to the runoff and therefore mathematically cannot win the presidency. The market previously priced her at 0.00, confirming this is a near-certain 'NO'.
